svg.aria-label: Antique chart of The Huldverk Archipelago, an archipelago in a temperate climate.
svg.title: The Huldverk Archipelago
svg.desc: Antique chart of The Huldverk Archipelago, an archipelago in a temperate climate.
svg.metadata: Vellum chart. Recipe: seed=23857 type=archipelago band=temperate land=0.24 grid=320x240 style=antique engine=0.1.0

g.text: Being a true & faithful chart of these waters, as surveyed
by Drerkkurk the Wayfarer in the year 836 of the Pale Age
